forbidden.name: no-telegram-outside-app
forbidden.comment: Grammy/Telegram is an I/O detail — only app.ts may import telegram.ts

forbidden.name: no-claude-outside-orchestrator
forbidden.comment: Only orchestrator may import claude.ts — everything else goes through orchestrator

forbidden.name: no-stt-outside-app
forbidden.comment: STT is an I/O detail — only app.ts may import stt.ts

forbidden.name: no-import-from-entrypoints
forbidden.comment: Entry points (cli, index) must not be imported by other modules (cli→index and tests are allowed)

forbidden.name: no-non-package-json
forbidden.comment: because an npm i --production will otherwise deliver an unreliably running package
